description_long: This is an ornate ring featuring a prominent central gemstone held in a raised prong setting, flanked by two slightly smaller gemstones on either side. The band is encrusted with a series of smaller stones, creating a continuous sparkling effect along the upper half of the ring. The prong settings for the main stones are elevated, allowing light to pass through and enhance their brilliance. The band appears to be made of a polished metal, likely platinum or white gold, with a smooth and glossy finish. The overall design is symmetrical and elegant, with a focus on maximizing the visual impact of the gemstones. This piece exudes a luxurious and sophisticated aesthetic, suitable for formal occasions or as an engagement ring.
description: A luxurious ring with a large central gemstone, flanked by two side stones and a band encrusted with smaller gems, all set in a polished metal band.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the band and the prong setting elevating the central gemstone.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three main gemstones and the encrusted band, with the central stone most prominent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, showing the band and prong setting from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to view 1, displaying the three main stones and the encrusted band from the opposite direction.
